navbar.signUpDescription: Choose your account type to get started with Poultry360

hero.description: Poultry360 makes your poultry business simple, smart, and stress-free. Easily track sales, manage expenses, maintain ledgers, control inventory & more so you can focus on growing your poultry business.

pwaModal.title: Add Poultry360 to your device
pwaModal.subtitle: Install the app for quick access from your home screen.
pwaModal.androidStep1: Open the browser menu (⋮) in the top corner.
pwaModal.androidStep2: Tap "Add to Home screen" or "Install app".
pwaModal.iphoneStep1: Tap the Share button (□ with arrow) at the bottom of Safari.
pwaModal.iphoneStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".

features.title: All in One Poultry Management App
features.subtitle: Poultry360 brings broiler and layer farmers, feed suppliers, feed mill companies, and veterinary doctors together—manage operations, inventory, and health in one platform.

layer.title: Layer Management
layer.description: Boost egg production and quality with straightforward tracking for your hens.

broiler.title: Broiler Management
broiler.description: Monitor growth and feed use to keep broilers healthy and improve productivity.

feedSupplier.title: Feed Supplier
feedSupplier.description: Manage orders, deliveries, and customer relationships in one place.

feedMill.title: Feed Mill Company
feedMill.description: Produce quality feed with accurate mixing and easy inventory management.

veterinary.title: Veterinary Doctor
veterinary.description: Track farm visits, prescriptions, and bird health across your client base.

reviews.title: What Our Farmers Say
reviews.subtitle: Real stories from poultry farmers who transformed their business with Poultry360
reviews.name: Name
reviews.submitSuccess: Thank you! Your review has been submitted.
reviews.emptyMessage: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience!

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your poultry business? Contact us today and let's discuss how Poultry360 can help you succeed.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your poultry farming needs...
contact.submitSuccess: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.submitError: Failed to send message. Please try again.
